# Role Mapping

This maps the core method roles to Anthropic-oriented usage patterns.

## Ideation Partner

- Best used in longer conversational planning sessions
- Focus on clarifying goals, constraints, and risks

## Roadmap Planner

- Best used after specs are stable enough to support sequencing
- Focus on milestones, phases, task breakdowns, and dependencies

## Implementation Planner

- Best used with a task document plus links or excerpts from relevant specs
- Focus on acceptance criteria, test cases, and scope boundaries

## Code Author

- Best used in environments with direct repository access and the ability to inspect or run tests
- Focus on implementing against the implementation plan rather than re-deciding requirements

## Session Closer

- Best used at the end of a focused work session
- Focus on summary, task updates, and commit-ready documentation changes
